name: LendNation
description_short: LendNation at 9413 N May Ave, Oklahoma City, OK offers fast payday and title loans with same-day approval.
description_long:
LendNation's Oklahoma City, OK location at 9413 N May Ave is a standalone storefront serving the Oklahoma City area with fast financial solutions during extended weekday hours. The branch operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, making it convenient for working professionals and those with daytime availability.

This Oklahoma City payday loan and title loan store provides fast financial solutions for immediate cash needs. Contact the branch at 405-752-2557 to discuss borrowing options, loan terms, and what documentation you'll need for your application.

For Oklahoma City residents needing quick cash between paychecks, this N May Ave location offers same-day approval and funding. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and banking information to apply. LendNation specializes in fast turnaround lending for urgent financial needs.
address: 9413 N May Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73120

company_info.headquarters: 9413 N May Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73120

pros: Multiple loan types available: payday loans, title loans, and multi-pay installment loans up to 36 months
Instant or same-day cash funding via instant debit card option
Can borrow against vehicle equity (cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, ATVs, RVs) while keeping vehicle
200+ locations across 11 states plus online application and approval
Fast application process with instant pre-approval decision stated on website
Additional money services: check cashing, direct deposit, mobile banking cards
Established location with 19+ years in business (since 2005) and 4.8/5 Google rating (161 reviews)
Accessible customer support via phone (210-520-4700 or 866-324-9565) and in-store assistance
cons: APRs, fees, and finance charges not disclosed on website; true cost opaque before application
Payday and title loans typically carry triple-digit APRs and high fees, creating high debt risk
No mention of alternative products, credit-building options, or debt counseling resources
Title loans require lien on vehicle, creating risk of vehicle repossession if payments missed
Limited transparency about eligibility requirements, income verification, or approval rates
best_for: Workers facing genuine short-term cash emergencies who need funds same-day and have exhausted other options
Vehicle owners needing larger cash amounts who can afford title loan repayment and accept repossession risk
Borrowers seeking installment repayment (multi-pay) over traditional single-payment payday loans
diagnosis: LendNation is best for consumers facing genuine short-term emergencies who need same-day cash and have exhausted faster, cheaper alternatives (employer advances, credit union PALs, friends/family, credit cards). The critical caveat: payday and title loans are expensive and carry high default risk; borrowers should only use these as a last resort, understand the full APR and fees before signing, and develop a repayment plan immediately. These are not debt-solving tools—they are emergency bridges.
services: Multi-pay payday loans (installment repayment up to 36 months)
Title loans (secured by vehicle, repaid over time)
Multiple vehicle types accepted for title loans (cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, ATVs, RVs by state)
meta_description: LendNation at 9413 N May Ave, Oklahoma City, OK. Fast payday and title loans with same-day approval.
